message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

actor "User"
participant "pub.com"
participant "prebid.js"
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js"
participant "SSPs"
participant "DSPs"
participant "gam.js"
participant "GAM/AdX"

User -> pub.com: 1. navigates browser to pub.com
pub.com -> prebid.js: 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
prebid.js -> prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js: 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js -> SSPs: 4. ad request
SSPs -> SSPs: 5. traffic quality controls
SSPs -> DSPs: 6. make bid requests
DSPs -> SSPs: 7. respond with bids
SSPs -> SSPs: 8. pub ad controls
SSPs -> prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js: 9. ad w/price
prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js -> prebid.js: 10. ad w/price
prebid.js -> prebid.js: 11. select appropriate ad
prebid.js -> gam.js: 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
prebid.js -> pub.com: 13. wait for ad slot to load

note over pub.com, gam.js
  At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)
end note

pub.com -> gam.js: 14. load slot
gam.js -> GAM/AdX: 15. ad request
GAM/AdX -> gam.js: 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item

alt [GAM/AdX highest bid]
  gam.js -> gam.js: 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
else [Prebid.js highest bid]
  gam.js -> pub.com: 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

pub.com -> User: 18. show highest value advertisement

@enduml
